name: Couche-Couche
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a heavy iron pot or skillet.
2. Mix the cornmeal, salt, baking powder, and milk thoroughly in the heated lard.
3. Allow a crust to form on top of the mixture.
4. Stir well and lower the heat to simmer.
5. Cover and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serves 6.
